description: " KFSF-DT (Channel 66) is a Univision-owned television station affiliated with TeleFutura, their new Spanish-language 24-hour network founded on January 14, 2002. KFSF is licensed to Vallejo and serves the San Francisco Bay Area. A sister station to KDTV-DT, KFSF features additional programming choices. Sports, including boxing and soccer; productions from Mexico by Televisa or Galavision (Mexico) and Venezuela; and nightly major Hollywood movies, dubbed in Spanish are KFSF's significant offerings. KDTV is also available on KFSF's digital subchannel (66.2)." -Taken from Wikipedia The content in this collection is provided for research, educational and information purposes (at present no content is available for viewing.)
title: KFSF (TeleFutura)
